message:
feat(fcp-host): enhance diagnostic system with connector self-check integration and repair hints

Expand the doctor diagnostic framework to convert connector self-check
reports into structured CheckResult entries with actionable remediation
guidance.

Add connector_id and code fields to CheckResult so diagnostic entries
trace back to the specific connector and check category that produced
them. Add repair_hints field carrying concrete remediation steps.

Add recommended_actions field to DoctorReport for report-level
actionable guidance derived from aggregated check results.

Implement check_result_from_self_check() to transform connector
SelfCheckReport entries into CheckResults with appropriate severity
mapping and connector attribution.

Implement repair_hints_for_self_check() to derive context-aware
remediation suggestions based on the check status and category (e.g.,
credential refresh hints for auth failures, connectivity suggestions
for unreachable endpoints).

Add default_self_check_message() for human-readable fallback status
messages when connector self-checks don't provide a custom message.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
